advancements.filched.aspect.filcher.root: An elusive creature adept at hidin both itself an itz belongings!
aspect.filched.filcher.bug.description: Dey r sensitive 2 teh %s enchantment an haz les helth along wit les reach!
aspect.filched.filcher.description:
Smal elusive beings capable ov slippin tween spaces an vanishin in2 a private pocket realm known as %s.
Wile ideal 4 hidin dere stolen treasures, dis unstable dimension threatens 2 consume dem if dey wandr 2 far!
aspect.filched.filcher.limbo_attuned.des:
Wile in %1$s, dey r biggr, but git extra armor, reach an minin speed. If dey crouch in %1$s, dey cn reduce dere size evn moar den outside ov %1$s!
Additionally it seems dat %1$s haz les effect on dem? Dey cn survive easir dere den others!! omg
aspect.filched.filcher.unusual_shape.des:
Dere body iz an oddity, dey r smallr, burn 4 longr an mine slower.
It's as-if dey duz nt belong heer..!
block.minecraft.bed.limbo_too_uneasy: U may nt rest nao; u feel 2 uneasy around heer
config.filched.filcher.limbo_generation_: Determines teh range in blocks witch nu Ewww Bug locashuns r picked wen tryin 2 entr %1$s 4 teh first tiem or wit owt an active %2$s!
(10000 means a random locashun tween teh corners ov (X,Z)=(10000,10000) an (X,Z)=(-10000,-10000) wil b picked; Settin dis 2 low values cn haz unstable results)
death.attack.lost_to_limbo.item: %1$s wuz lost 2 Limob tryin 2 escape %2$s usin %3$s
Haz a Wasted curse ur Equipment
Exposes teh wearr 2 teh elements ov %s, wit owt protection.
Wearer wil b reshaped in2 sumthin else if worn 4 2 long..!! omg
filched.description: Azpects addon addin a nu Azpect capable ov goin in2 a nu dimension 2 "safely" store anytin u desire!
